title: Periodic table's sexy suspender striptease
description:
Took almost a week.

The video works like this: every element of the periodic table has a number, and all the numbers of every element were gonna be the lenght in frames for my project, so I seperated the element video remixes by areas. Each area is 1 frame longer than the previous one and for one area, I took footages from "periodicvideos" about one element. Between the areas, there is a 1-frames long title indicating the next element footage.

Project files: http://www.mediafire.com/?lkh95i2ktiyzr
